wizard.title: New Customer Onsite Problem
wizard.subtitle: Three required inputs identify the service branch and SQL dialect. Without them, analysis cannot start. The directory will be auto-created as YYYYMMDD-<customer>.
wizard.otherHint: Database type unspecified — please confirm on site later
wizard.dzNote: Each archive extracts to its own subdirectory (pod-1/, pod-2/, …) — overwrites are blocked to avoid blind spots.
wizard.uploadHint: .zip / .tar.gz supported, ≤ 200MB per file, up to 20 files
wizard.uploadBeforeCreate: Please create the problem before uploading files
wizard.titleTooLong: Title must be at most 80 characters

chat.assistantRole: Claude · Investigation order: logs → source → DB
chat.placeholder: Add context, paste a log snippet, or ask Claude to continue the next step…
chat.composerHint: Claude Code only · CWD locked at {cwd}

error.configInvalid: Customer config is invalid or not loaded yet
error.reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least 8 characters

discipline.softeningTag: Softening words detected — please use a deterministic conclusion
discipline.suspectToast: This root cause summary may be inaccurate — please verify the evidence
discipline.writeProtectionCounter: Root cause is currently locked. Contact an admin to modify.
